consensus_notes: All 5 workers agree: collaboration bus is implemented in stampede.sh but undocumented in SKILL.md/README and absent from the commander agent definition. The protocol relies entirely on runtime prompt injection, creating a fragile contract.
key_findings: Collab bus (propose->review->improve->consensus->broadcast->adopt) exists in stampede.sh but is completely undocumented in SKILL.md, README, and commander agent.md
Commander agent.md has zero collab bus awareness — protocol delivered solely via runtime prompt injection at stampede.sh:910
Bundle schema in agent.md lacks adopted/source_refs fields required by the launcher prompt
Ledger initialization uses plain writes not atomic temp+rename for swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl
Malformed ledger tolerance is good (silent degradation, isolated blast radius) but has zero observability
Broadcast/adoption phases have no documentation or enforcement — commanders operate in documented isolation
recommendations: Add collaboration bus section to commander agent.md with ledger formats and participation rules
Document collab protocol in SKILL.md and README for contributor visibility
Use atomic temp+rename for initial swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl writes
Add adopted/source_refs fields to bundle schema in agent.md
Add a ledger-audit subcommand or post-run sanity check for malformed lines
